docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00- SERVED FEB-07-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PADILLA, ALEJANDRO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,814.26 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PADILLA, ALEJANDRO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-21-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-21-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-21-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY IRMA GUERRERO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PADILLA, ALEJANDRO $1,814.26 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,929.26, ON DEFAULTED LOAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-21-2018 - JUDGMENT.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PADILLA, ALEJANDRO
